---
title: "Pre-Training Session"
date: 2025-08-21
---

### Schedule

| Time | Activity | Facilitator |
| ---- | -------- | ----------- |
| 10:00 – 11:00 AM | Welcome & orientation (5 min) | Henry Kissinger |
| | Icebreaker Activity (5 min) | |
| | Introduction to Google Classroom & Breakout Rooms + Activity (25 min) | |
| | Plenary debrief (10 min) | |
| | Tech check & logistics (10 min) | |
| | Q&A and closing (5 min) | |
